title: IntegrityPlan
description: JSON Schema for CXO integrity task JSON-LD files. Each file declares a list of Schema.org Action tasks towards implementation of ASI Saga and Business Infinity.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must resolve to the canonical integrity context.

@id.description: Canonical IRI for this integrity plan. Pattern: agent:{agent_id}/integrity

legend.description: The legend or archetype embodied by this agent.

purpose.description: The overarching purpose of this integrity plan.

tasks.description: Ordered list of Schema.org Action tasks towards implementation of ASI Saga and Business Infinity.

IntegrityTask.title: IntegrityTask
IntegrityTask.description: A single Schema.org Action task towards implementation of ASI Saga and Business Infinity.

description.description: Detailed description of what must be done and why it matters for ASI Saga and Business Infinity.

actionStatus.description: Current execution status using Schema.org ActionStatus vocabulary.

result.description: The concrete deliverable produced when this task is complete.

planner_task_id.description: Microsoft Planner task ID once this task has been synced to a Planner plan. Populated by the planner sync workflow.
